title: The Xteink X4 Pro is a tiny ereader with more features than you might expect - Engadget
summary: Most people would probably look at something like the Boox Palma 2 Pro and assume ereaders don't get much smaller, but the Xteink X4 Pro makes that device look almost unwieldy by comparison.
